name: API Doc Generator
description: Parses a source code repository, extracts API signatures and docstrings, generates formatted reference documentation with examples, and publishes a report.

form_fields.label: Repository Path
form_fields.description: Local path to the source repository to document

form_fields.label: Include Globs
form_fields.description: Comma-separated globs of files to include

form_fields.label: Report Format
form_fields.description: Format for the final documentation report

form_fields.label: Report Output Directory
form_fields.description: Directory where the documentation will be saved

skills.name: Discover Source Files
skills.description: Walk the repository and collect the set of source files matching the include globs.

skills.name: Extract API Signatures
skills.description: Parse each source file to extract public functions, classes, signatures, and docstrings.

skills.name: Generate Examples
skills.description: Produce concise usage examples for each documented API element.

skills.name: Render Documentation Report
skills.description: Assemble the API model and examples into a formatted report and save it.
